description: The Color By Velocity Direction component changes the color of a particle depending on the dot product of it's velocity vs a specified axis.

fields.ReferenceDirection: The direction to make a dot product with the particle's velocity.
fields.AlignedColor: The color the particle should be when it has velocity that gives dot product of 1 with ``ReferenceDirection``.
fields.OrthogonalColor: The color the particle should be when it has velocity that gives dot product of 0 with ``ReferenceDirection``.
fields.OppositeColor: The color the particle should be when it has velocity that gives dot product of -1 with ``ReferenceDirection``.
